glosses.ja: こんなに多く; そんなに多く

sentences.target: Er verdient so viel wie ich.

translations.de: Er verdient so viel wie ich.
translations.en: He earns as much as I do.
translations.ru: Он зарабатывает столько же, сколько и я.
translations.vi: Anh ấy kiếm được nhiều như tôi.
translations.uk: Він заробляє стільки ж, скільки й я.
translations.hi: वह उतना कमाता है जितना मैं कमाता हूँ.
translations.pl: On zarabia tyle samo co ja.
translations.nb: Han tjener like mye som meg.
translations.sv: Han tjänar lika mycket som jag.
translations.ro: El câștigă la fel de mult ca mine.
translations.da: Han tjener lige så meget som mig.
translations.fi: Hän ansaitsee yhtä paljon kuin minä.
translations.ja: 彼は私と同じくらい稼いでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject (3rd person singular nominative) of the finite verb.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular present); predicates the earning action.
Degree adverb forming the equative construction 'so … wie'; modifies the quantifier 'viel'.
Quantifier used pronominally ('much'); measure/object of 'verdient' within the equative construction.
Subordinating conjunction introducing an elliptical comparative clause (standard of comparison).
Personal pronoun; nominative subject inside the comparative clause (verb elided).

sentences.target: Ich weiß so viel wie du.

translations.de: Ich weiß so viel wie du.
translations.en: I know as much as you.
translations.ru: Я знаю столько же, сколько и ты.
translations.uk: Я знаю стільки ж, скільки й ти.
translations.hi: मैं उतना जानता हूँ जितना तुम जानते हो.
translations.nb: Jeg vet like mye som deg.
translations.id: Aku tahu sama banyaknya dengan kamu.
translations.sv: Jag vet lika mycket som du.
translations.ro: Știu la fel de mult ca tine.
translations.da: Jeg ved lige så meget som dig.
translations.ja: 私はあなたと同じくらい知っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject (1st person singular nominative).
Finite main verb (1st person singular present); predicates knowing.
Degree adverb in the equative 'so … wie'; modifies 'viel'.
Pronominal quantifier ('much'); measure/complement of 'weiß'.
Subordinating conjunction introducing the comparative clause.
Personal pronoun; nominative subject inside the comparative clause (verb elided).

sentences.target: Das kostet so viel wie gestern.

translations.de: Das kostet so viel wie gestern.
translations.en: That costs as much as yesterday.
translations.es: Eso cuesta lo mismo que ayer.
translations.fr: Ça coûte le même prix qu’hier.
translations.ru: Это стоит столько же, сколько вчера.
translations.pt: Isso custa o mesmo que ontem.
translations.vi: Nó có giá bằng hôm qua.
translations.uk: Це коштує стільки ж, як учора.
translations.hi: यह उतना ही महँगा है जितना कल.
translations.pl: To kosztuje tyle samo co wczoraj.
translations.nb: Det koster like mye som i går.
translations.sv: Det kostar lika mycket som igår.
translations.da: Det koster lige så meget som i går.
translations.fi: Se maksaa yhtä paljon kuin eilen.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun; subject (3rd person singular neuter) of 'kostet'.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular present); predicates cost.
Degree adverb in the equative 'so … wie'; modifies 'viel'.
Pronominal quantifier ('much') denoting amount; complement of 'kostet'.
Subordinating conjunction introducing the comparative standard.
Temporal adverb serving as the standard in an elliptical comparative clause ('wie gestern [es kostete]').

sentences.target: Sie trinkt so viel wie ihr Bruder.
sentences.reading: /ziː trɪŋkt zoː fiːl viː iːɐ̯ ˈbruːdɐ/

translations.de: Sie trinkt so viel wie ihr Bruder.
translations.ipa: /ziː trɪŋkt zoː fiːl viː iːɐ̯ ˈbruːdɐ/
translations.en: She drinks as much as her brother.
translations.es: Ella bebe tanto como su hermano.
translations.fr: Elle boit autant que son frère.
translations.zh-Hans: 她喝得和她哥哥一样多。
translations.yue: 佢飲嘢同佢哥哥一樣多。
translations.ru: Она пьёт столько же, сколько её брат.
translations.pt: Ela bebe tanto quanto o irmão dela.
translations.vi: Cô ấy uống nhiều như anh trai của cô ấy.
translations.ar: هي تشرب بقدر ما يشرب أخوها.
translations.nl: Zij drinkt evenveel als haar broer.
translations.uk: Вона п’є стільки ж, скільки її брат.
translations.hi: वह उतना पीती है जितना उसका भाई.
translations.pl: Ona pije tyle samo co jej brat.
translations.el: Πίνει όσο και ο αδελφός της.
translations.nb: Hun drikker like mye som broren sin.
translations.sv: Hon dricker lika mycket som sin bror.
translations.ro: Ea bea la fel de mult ca fratele ei.
translations.da: Hun drikker lige så meget som sin bror.
translations.fi: Hän juo yhtä paljon kuin hänen veljensä.
translations.ja: 彼女は兄と同じくらい飲みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject (3rd person singular feminine) of 'trinkt'.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular present); predicates drinking.
Degree adverb in the equative 'so … wie'; modifies 'viel'.
Pronominal quantifier ('much') measuring the amount drunk.
Subordinating conjunction introducing the comparative clause (elliptical).
Possessive determiner modifying 'Bruder'; inside the comparative clause.
Common noun; head of the NP; nominative subject in the comparative clause (verb elided).

hi: वह उतना कमाता है जितना मैं कमाता हूँ.

el: Πίνει όσο και ο αδελφός της.
nb: Han tjener like mye som meg.
